traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.
